---
title: "Chris Steadman"
about:
  # Templates include: jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, or broadside
  # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  image: img/headshot4.jpg
  links:
    # Available icons: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:stead032@umn.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-steadman-214021227/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/cjsteadman
    # Academic Icons: https://jpswalsh.github.io/academicons/
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0003-8506-9049

---

Welcome! I'm a Ph.D. student in Educational Psychology at the University of Minnesota - Twin Cities, with an interest in understanding learners experiences with failure.
